name: 3gal Open Vanity Waste Basket Black - Brightroom™: Compact Matte Plastic Indoor Trash Can, Small Size, Bathroom Use
description:
Help keep your vanity stay organized with this Open Vanity Wastebasket from Brightroom™. This plastic wastebasket features an open top design for easy disposal of trash. It features a rectangular silhouette with slightly curved edges at the bottom, while the compact size makes it easy to stash in smaller spaces. Showcasing a solid black hue, it's sure to add sleek style to your any decor.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
